User.title: User
User.description: A user of the habit tracker app.

points.description: Total points earned by the user.

currentStreak.description: Current consecutive days of completing at least one habit.

bestStreak.description: Highest streak achieved by the user.

totalHabitsCompleted.description: Total number of habits completed over time.

unlockedAchievements.description: List of achievement IDs unlocked by the user.

lastActiveDate.description: The last date (YYYY-MM-DD) the user was active/completed a habit.

updatedAt.description: When the user was last updated.

Habit.title: Habit
Habit.description: A habit created by a user.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns this habit.

reminderTime.description: Optional time (HH:MM) to remind the user to complete the habit.

updatedAt.description: When the habit was last updated.

HabitLog.title: HabitLog
HabitLog.description: A record of a habit being completed on a specific date.

userId.description: The ID of the user who completed the habit.

habitId.description: The ID of the habit that was completed.

date.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) the habit was completed.

completedAt.description: The exact timestamp when the habit was marked complete.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores user profiles and gamification stats.

/habits/{habitId}.description: Stores the habits created by users.

/habitLogs/{logId}.description: Stores the daily completion records for habits.
